Chronic Conditions Warehouse Virtual Research Data Center 
MBSF Other Chronic or Potentially Disabling Conditions Segment Codebook │ August 2025 │ V 1.7 41 

LIVER_MEDICARE_EVER 

LABEL: Liver Disease, Cirrhosis and Other Liver Conditions (excluding Hepatitis) First Ever Occurrence Date — 
Medicare Only Claims 

DESCRIPTION: This variable shows the date when the beneficiary first met the criteria for the liver disease, cirrhosis, 
and other liver conditions (excluding hepatitis) indicator. The
